templates.text: 🥊 {p1} and {p2} traded blows — both ate the punch!

🪙 {p1} and {p2} traded length like change at a corner store!

🎺 {p1} and {p2} hit operatic notes — both took it!

🎯 {attacker} found a gap in {defender}'s guard and broke through!

🥊 {attacker} caught {defender} in the open — not a knockout, but it stings!
🪶 {attacker} weaved past {defender}'s block and connected!
🌀 {attacker} spun the attack — {defender} couldn't reset the block!
🦅 {attacker} dove from above — {defender} only blinked!
🥋 {attacker} pulled a clean technique, {defender} fumbled the defense!
⚡ {attacker} struck faster than sound, {defender} heard it later!
🪓 {attacker} chopped wide open, {defender} missed the warning!
🎲 {attacker} guessed where to aim — {defender}'s block was elsewhere!
🐍 {attacker} slithered past {defender}'s defense!
🪃 {attacker} threw a boomerang, {defender} got distracted and missed the real one!
🥇 {attacker} struck a gold-medal hit, {defender} got no podium!
🛠 {attacker} duct-taped a strike together, {defender} couldn't put tools back!
🔮 {attacker} predicted {defender}'s block — went around it!
🌊 {attacker} crashed in like a wave, {defender} didn't reach the block!
🛹 {attacker} skated under {defender}'s defense and clipped from below!
🦊 {attacker} faked {defender} sideways and hit the real target!
